title: Smoked Mackerel Dulet
description: A German twist on traditional Ethiopian dulet, featuring smoked mackerel and a tangy flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Tangy Mustard
ingredients.notes: such as whole-grain or honey mustard

instructions: In a medium-sized bowl, mix together the flaked smoked mackerel, Ethiopian spices, tangy mustard, smoked paprika, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, accompanied by crackers or toasted bread for a satisfying snack.
